spec_match.rationale: The demo now probes LanguageModel.availability() with explicit expected input/output language metadata, shows the matching LanguageModel.create() shapes for text, image, and audio, and surfaces Prompt API unsupported states without crashing.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verified the script initializes, text input updates the request shape, availability branch buttons update the live note and Send response, image/audio tabs swap request shapes, and Send exposes no-image/no-recording boundaries.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: The UI now has reachable available, downloadable, downloading, unavailable, and error branches. DevTools MCP also verified the live unavailable Prompt API state, the image-without-file boundary, the audio-without-recording boundary, and a forced getUserMedia NotAllowedError recording path.

references.rationale: The see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5134603979063296, matching the Prompt API feature ID used by the feature page and conformance route.

design_system.rationale: The repaired local styles use shared CSS variables, pair every local button background with color, and remove the previous raw runtime hex colors and low-contrast selected-drop text.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP reproduced the original failure before repair: the inline script threw a SyntaxError, the support probe stayed stuck, tab clicks did not switch panes, and the concept linked the wrong ChromeStatus feature. After repair, DevTools MCP verified initialization, the correct Prompt API ChromeStatus link, text prompt editing, live unavailable availability state, downloadable/downloading/unavailable/error branch previews, synthetic Send responses for blocked branches, image and audio request-shape swaps, no-image and no-recording boundaries, and a forced microphone NotAllowedError path. The concept page has one expected Chrome Prompt API warning because the local model service is not running, no script errors, and no failed local network requests. The feature conformance route reported 7 PASS / 0 FAIL with a clean console.
